mainText:
Promo: "Bank of Entitlement - Where entitlement meets exceptional service! Get your unlimited overdrafts today! "

Visit Bank of Entitlement dot com for more.

ENTITLEMENT STORY: So, get this-I waltz into Bank of Entitlement, expecting my usual red carpet treatment. But what do I see? A line. A LINE. Me, Hot Josh, waiting in line like some commoner. I nearly fainted from the audacity. But did they know who I was? Oh no, they didn't. So what did I do? I demanded to speak to the manager, naturally.I strut up to the teller, making a show of my impatience. "Excuse me," I say, "do you have any idea who I am?" The teller blinks at me, unimpressed. "Sir, you need to wait in line like everyone else." Wait in line? ME? I felt a rage building inside me that not even my trust fund could soothe.I ask for the manager, and in storms this poor, unsuspecting soul. I let him have it. I rant about my time being precious, about VIP treatment, about the sheer nerve of making me wait. And you know what he does? He apologizes. He apologizes, begs my forgiveness, and promises me a personal banker for life.I left that bank feeling like a true king among peasants. Because that's what entitlement is all about-knowing your worth and making sure everyone else does too. And Bank of Entitlement? They just gained one very loyal, very entitled customer.
